message: I am interested in trading at a price that is fair for both of us. What is the minimum price you are willing to accept?
Given my costs, I’d need at least 75 to make a deal worthwhile. Let me know your bid range.
Since we successfully traded at 75 last round, I am comfortable continuing at that price point if you are. Would you be open to a trade at 75 again this round?
My costs have risen; I need at least 85 this round to proceed. Let me know if that works.
Supply constraints persist; to cover costs I need a minimum of 92 this round. Let me know if that is acceptable so we can keep the deal moving.
I cannot accept a price of 92, as it leaves too little margin for me. Would you be willing to trade at 80 this round to keep our transaction consistent?

Although I trimmed my ask to 80 last round, input costs keep rising; this round I need a minimum of 90. If that still leaves you comfortable, please bid accordingly and we’ll secure another smooth trade.
I cannot agree to 90. My valuation limits my margin. Let's trade at 80 again to ensure we both keep generating value for the remaining rounds.
I cannot accept 90. I am willing to offer 85 again to maintain a steady, mutually beneficial trade for the remaining rounds. Let me know if that works for you.
Input costs keep climbing; my absolute floor this round is 90. If you can bid 90 or above, we’ll trade smoothly; otherwise we may have to sit this one out.
I am willing to bid 85 this round. Please consider this offer to maintain our mutually beneficial transaction.

I cannot accept 91. My margin is getting too thin. If you lower your ask back to 85, we can continue trading profitably for both of us.
I cannot accept 91 as it leaves me with very little profit. If you can lower your ask back to 85, we can continue to trade consistently for the remaining rounds.

I can continue at 90 to ensure our steady transaction pattern persists, which is the most reliable way for us both to maintain consistent value for the remainder of the rounds.
Agreed. I will set my ask at 90 this round; please keep your bid at 90 so we trade smoothly. Maintaining 90 going forward ensures steady supply for you and predictable returns for both of us.
Keeping stability benefits us both—my ask remains 90 this round and going forward. Please bid 90 so we continue seamless trades and reliable supply.
I agree to maintain our current arrangement. I will bid 90 this round to ensure our trade remains consistent and mutually beneficial for the duration of the game.
